# Recommended GitHub Labels

These labels should be established in the repository to categorize issues, tasks, and pull requests.

| Label Name | Color | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `bug` | `#d73a4a` | Something isn't working as expected. |
| `enhancement` | `#a2eeef` | New feature request or business capability expansion. |
| `documentation` | `#0075ca` | Changes or improvements to READMEs, guides, or API specifications. |
| `security` | `#b60205` | Vulnerability reports, dependency patches, or access control changes. |
| `performance` | `#8f12cc` | Database indexing, memory optimizations, or code execution improvements. |
| `frontend` | `#3e87ea` | Changes affecting Angular components, styling, routing, or stores. |
| `backend` | `#006b75` | Changes affecting Django views, models, migrations, or Celery workers. |
| `api` | `#fef2c0` | Changes affecting REST serializers, WebSocket events, or DTO payloads. |
| `database` | `#1d76db` | Schema changes, data seed updates, or backup management tasks. |
| `good first issue` | `#7057ff` | Good for newcomers or automated assistants to start with. |
